arts.ttl: Arsenal identify 'perfect' William Saliba replacement as Viktor Gyokeres sold Arteta project - Josh Holland
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres has been told to choose Arsenal's project over Manchester United by ex-Gunners star Anders Limpar. football.london says: "Planning for potential exits of star players is vital and something Arsenal have got wrong in the past.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Bukayo Saka injury concern as Gunners star labelled 'flop of the season'
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka, Declan Rice and Leandro Trossard are all doubts for Arsenal's Premier League game against Nottingham Forest on Saturday after international break injuries

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury news: Important player 'remains a doubt' for visit of Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Arsenal winger Bukayo Saka remains a doubt for the Premier League clash with Nottingham Forest on Saturday, after pulling out of England duty last week.

arts.ttl: Arsenal coach calls UWCL knockout spot 'surreal'
arts.sum: Arsenal interim manager Renee Slegers said it's "surreal" to have progressed to the Champions League Quarter Finals after a narrow win over Juventus despite a slow start to the competition.

arts.ttl: Arsenal have transformed their season – now there is a decision to make
arts.sum: Arsenal 1-0 Juventus: Renee Slegers continued her unbeaten spell in charge as the Gunners qualified for the Champions League quarter-finals

arts.ttl: Simon Jordan drops Arsene Wenger comment in Man City APT verdict as Arsenal set for huge vote
arts.sum: Pundit Simon Jordan has criticised both Manchester City and the Premier League for their communication between each other amid the Associated Party Transaction (APT) rules row. And people will suggest that's because Manchester City have been attacked by the Premier League and there's a conspiracy of a cartel that want to keep them down.

arts.ttl: Lina Hurtig’s late strike seals quarters for Arsenal and knocks out Juventus
arts.athr: Suzanne Wrack at the Emirates Stadium
arts.sum: Lina Hurtig’s late poke-in ensured Arsenal secured a spot in the Champions League knockout stage with two group games remaining, a 1-0 win over Juventus enough to put them clear at the expense of the Italian club. The Gunners needed a win to ensure progression to the quarter-finals after Bayern Munich’s 1-1 draw with Valerenga in Norway. Instead of the Group C standings being finely poised, Hurtig’s goal gave them the breathing room they so desperately wanted before they face Bayern at Meadow Park to very likely decide who tops the group. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Lina Hurtig caps a satisfying night of Champions League progress for Arsenal
arts.sum: The Swede struck in the 89th minute to finally break Juventus’ resistance.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 1-0 Juventus: Player ratings as the Gunners seal place in Champions League knockouts
arts.sum: UWCL player ratings from Arsenal's 1-0 victory over Juventus at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: I scored a hungover hat-trick on my Arsenal debut
arts.sum: Pennant has candidly recounted the time he was unexpectedly named in Arsenal's starting XI, admitting he "felt sick" as he thought Wenger had called for Ray Parlour instead. Former Arsenal winger Jermaine Pennant has issued a heartfelt apology to his former manager Arsene Wenger after recounting the time he played for Arsenal while hungover.
